board_csa_architect.notes: Clean infra change. No schema impact. Aligns with REF-INFRASTRUCTURE documented budgets. No scalability concerns — limits are tier-specific.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: No new attack surface. Resource limits reduce DoS risk from container escape. No PII or RLS impact. Improves defense-in-depth.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/prompt impact. Brain memory limit of 8G aligns with 5.7G VRAM + PyTorch overhead. No VRAM budget conflict.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Critical for 3AM stability. OOM kills are contained per-service instead of cascading. Docker restart policies already handle recovery. No deployment procedure change needed.

board_red_team.notes: Failure scenarios: (1) Limits too tight causes OOM during model loading — mitigated by 8G limit > 5.7G VRAM budget. (2) Memory reservation sum exceeds host RAM — spec caps at 12G/16G. (3) CPU throttling during peak inference — 4 CPU for brain is sufficient. STRIDE: Spoofing=N/A, Tampering=N/A (declarative config), Repudiation=N/A, Info Disclosure=N/A, DoS=IMPROVED (primary purpose), Elevation=N/A. Anti-AC already covers tight limits and GPU reservation preservation.
